name: Tortillas De Harina
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour with the salt.
2. Add the vegetable shortening and enough water to form a dough.
3. Form balls of dough, let stand for 10 minutes.
4. Roll out each ball using a rolling pin to make tortillas.
5. Cook the tortillas on a hot "comal" or skillet without any shortening until they form small steam bubbles, then flip and cook the other side until cooked through.
6. Allow to cool and refrigerate.
```
